gaps.title: Add TraitBeatmap for beat-timeline scene orchestration (A-009 example-driven request)
gaps.description: While refreshing examples/cross-domain/concert-venue.refreshed.holo, the scene needed a way to map discrete beat/timestamp cue-points to named scene events (e.g. { bpm: 128, cues: [{ t: 0, event: 'intro' }, { t: 32, event: 'drop' }, { t: 64, event: 'outro' }] }). The current pattern requires manual on 'beat' handlers with beatCount math, which is fragile and hard to read. A @beatmap trait with a declarative cue list + BPM binding would serve every music/performance/rhythmic example. Suggested API shape: @beatmap { bpm: 128, sync_to: 'AudioAnalysis', cues: [{ beat: 0, event: 'intro' }, { beat: 16, event: 'fog_roll' }, { beat: 32, event: 'spot_reveal' }, { beat: 64, event: 'show_start' }] }. On each beat tick the trait checks the cue list and emits the matching event. Without this, beat-reactive examples accumulate redundant state counter logic.
